message:
fix: update FilterTabs test to match i18n translation keys (#3850) (#3861)

PR #3789 extracted hardcoded strings to i18n translation keys, but the
test still expected the raw English text 'Custom'. Since the test mocks
react-i18next to return the key itself, the display value is now
'common.custom' rather than 'Custom'.

Closes #3850
Closes #3854

Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
